channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Monthly)

item.title: 📝 mattjaybe/SillyTavern-Larson (14 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: mattjaybe

📝 Repository: mattjaybe/SillyTavern-Larson

📄 Descrizione: Beautiful animated status bar for SillyTavern with 8 unique styles (Gradient, Breathe, Pulse, Cylon, Segment, Glitch, Liquid, Convergence). Independent animations for Generating/Thinking/Idle states, custom theme creator, mobile-optimized UI, and smart LLM thinking detection.
